description_long: This is a medium-sized, round pumpkin with a vibrant orange skin and a sturdy, elongated greenish-brown stem protruding from the top. The surface of the pumpkin is slightly ribbed, with subtle vertical grooves running from the stem to the base, and a few small natural blemishes and marks. The skin appears matte with a semi-hard texture, typical of a fresh pumpkin. The stem is thick, slightly curved, and has a rougher, woody appearance compared to the smooth body. There are no visible carvings, facial features, or decorative accessories on the pumpkin. The object is uncarved and appears fresh, suitable for display or use in urban autumnal settings.
description: A round, orange pumpkin with a prominent greenish-brown stem and subtle ribbing, uncarved and natural in appearance.
description_view_0: The pumpkin is shown with its stem angled slightly forward, highlighting the roundness and subtle ribbing on the front surface.
description_view_1: This view emphasizes the side of the pumpkin, showing more pronounced surface blemishes and a clear view of the stem's base.
description_view_2: The pumpkin appears slightly more elongated from this angle, with the stem leaning back and the ribbing less pronounced.
description_view_3: The rear view displays the pumpkin's smooth curvature and the full length of the stem, with minimal surface marks visible.
